_comment_invite_members: invite_members controls whether org members are invited to the target org.
true  — ACTIVE MIGRATION / DISASTER RECOVERY: members are invited and
issue assignees are applied. Use this when people need to start
working in the target org immediately.
false — BACKUP / READ-ONLY MIRROR: no invitations are sent, no issue
assignees are set, and team member lists are not synced.
Team structures and repo permissions are still mirrored so the
org is fully ready to flip to DR mode at any time.

_comment_resume_after_pr: Per-repo resume points for the closed-PR loop.
When a repo entry is present, the stage fast-forwards past all closed PRs
with number > the given value — identical to passing --start-after-pr N on
the command line but persistent across runs and scoped per repo.
Remove the entry (or set it to 0) once the repo is fully mirrored.

stage_10_mirror_teams._comment_force_privacy: Force all mirrored teams to this visibility regardless of source. 'secret' = hidden (only org owners + team members can see it). 'closed' = visible to all org members. Omit or set null to mirror source value.
stage_10_mirror_teams._comment_force_notification_setting: Force all mirrored teams to this notification setting regardless of source. 'notifications_disabled' or 'notifications_enabled'. Omit or set null to mirror source value.
